overall.description: First-person perspective of someone walking along a dark dirt trail at night, illuminated by a flashlight. The path is surrounded by grass and vegetation, with a stone wall or structure briefly appearing on the right side mid-way through the clip.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves forward along a narrow dirt trail through dark countryside at night. A flashlight illuminates the uneven path and surrounding grass verges. Midway through, a stone wall becomes visible on the right side while the trail continues into the dark tree line ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a dark rural trail that gradually reveals a structured boundary before disappearing into a dense tree line. It begins by tracking along a narrow dirt path in the countryside at night, where a flashlight cuts through the darkness to illuminate the uneven ground and surrounding grass verges. As the camera advances, the beam of light catches a stone wall emerging on the right side of the trail. The scene then shifts as the path continues forward, moving away from the wall and deeper into the shadows. Finally, the camera pushes toward a dark, looming tree line that swallows the trail ahead.
